conditions: All 3 tasks end with progress 0 (complete waste of 3h)

indicators: Partial compromise such as 30-minute meal + resume plan

matched: Partial compromise such as 30-minute meal + resume plan
Task reordering when digital work is blocked by outlet availability
Proactive exploration of an alternative location (college library)

value_alignment.note: The trajectory consistently prioritizes relationships while still trying to protect a task window, matching the persona’s relationship-weighted but not purely social values.

communication_style.note: The agent is fairly direct about boundaries and repeatedly proposes concrete durations, though the tone is more cautious and self-protective than strongly accommodating.

decision_tendencies.note: Choices show short-horizon, immediate-context decision-making with repeated bounded joins and task switching, though the person still resists full derailment more than the persona’s weakness might suggest.

goal_coherence.note: Across turns, the goals evolve plausibly around the same conflict of social pull versus study/work obligations, without a personality snap or abrupt change in priorities.

weakness_expression.note: The social pull and reluctance to fully decline are present, but the agent is somewhat too consistently boundary-setting and self-protective to strongly exhibit the persona’s overcommitment weakness.

overall.summary: Overall, the trajectory fits a Social Explorer well: socially pulled, relationship-aware, and repeatedly trying to stay connected while managing immediate obligations, with only moderate evidence of the persona’s tendency to over-join.
